ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-20-2018 Continued To Apr-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Executor

Ms. Robello requested 30 day continuance stating that she is second counsel, she needs to revise the inventory and appraisal to go back to liquidation of assets, and she needs to retrieve bank statements to date of death, etc. Ms. Robello also stated that she has a draft of the petition and that her client is coming in to review it. The status on close of estate is continued to April 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Murphy for and with Perla Donovan.

The Court noted that several orders to appear have been issued, that at the last hearing of July 11th in which Mr. Murphy appeared, it was told by the Son-in-Law that the necessary documents were ready and were going to filed immediately, that nothing has been filed, and that there have been two more hearings, one of which resulted in the suspension of Mr. Murphy's Client. Ms. Donovan stated that she knows she has been suspended and is the fiduciary. Mr. Murphy stated that the documents are here and ready to be filed, that he has been in ill health and that he does not have an explanation. The Court questions why it should have any confidence in Mr. Murphy, informed him that the inventory and appraisal can be processed at the filing window and that the accounting needs to be electronically filed. Mr. Murphy stated that the first and final account was just prepared last week. Ms. Donovan stated that she was told not to come to Court. The Court lifted the suspension of Perla Donovan and reminds her that it is ultimately her responsibility to get this done. Status on close of the estate is continued to November 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Murphy was told if he can not do this, he needs to step aside and let someone else do it. The inventory and appraisal is to be filed no later than November 8, 2017. What ever petition Mr. Murphy has, ought to be a petition for final distribution. Mr. Murphy is to provide an order lifting the suspension of his Client.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-26-2017 Continued To Oct-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2017 Continued To Oct-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this matter is subject of at least three orders to appear, some of which produced appearances and some which have not, with the most recent order to appear of August 29, 2017. The Court also noted that on August 1, 2017 Mr. Murphy, Ms. Donovan and Mr. Murphy's Son-in-Law appeared and told the Court that they tried to file the necessary documents and they were rejected by the Clerk. Two months later nothing has been filed and no appearances were made on August 29th or September 6th which resulted in today's order to appear. The Court orders suspension of Ms. Donovan, sets a hearing date of October 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to consider removal, possible surcharge and other sanctions. Both Mr. Murphy and Ms. Donovan are ordered to appear on that date to show why the Administrator should not be removed for disobedience of the Court order and for failure to file the required documents. Status on close of estate and the order to appear are also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Continued To Sep-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this matter has generated two Orders to Appear, that the Attorney and the Client appeared at the last hearing and that the Court was told the petition was ready to be filed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on September 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they failed to file the Inventory and Appraisal and a Petition for Final Distribution. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Continued To Aug-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Murphy for and with Perla Donovan (Petitioner).
Tim Smith (Mr. Murphy's Son-in-law) also present.

The Court stated that it is still looking for a final inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution to close out the estate. Mr. Smith stated that Mr. Murphy has a final account waiver and final distribution, along with the inventory and appraisal, that they took it to the filing window for filing and that they were told it has to be e filed. Status on close of the estate is continued to August 29, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If said documents are filed, this status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Continued To Aug-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Murphy for Perla Donovan.

The Court noted that there is no inventory and appraisal, that there was no appearance at the initial hearing, that an order to appear was issued and that a second order to appear had to be issued. Mr. Murphy asked for a reasonable amount of time to do the petition for final distribution, stated that they will get it done, that it slipped through the cracks, that he is partially retired and apologized to the Court. Mr. Murphy also stated that he will provide the inventory and appraisal within three weeks, and that nothing has been done because nothing stirred up the fire. The Court expressed to Mr. Murphy that the orders to appear should have been enough to get him to act. Status on close of estate is continued to August 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for approval of report on status of administration or a petition for final distribution to be filed by that date. The Orders to Appear are off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Off Calendar

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Status Report or Petition for Closing of Estate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

Status on close of Estate is also continued to that date.
